prompts:
STYLE BLOCK: Visual Layout: Seamless single scene. Background: Create a soft gradient - extract 1-2 accent colors from reference images, convert them to very soft PASTEL versions, then blend with cream (#FFF9F0). Half of the background should remain cream/off-white. Keep it subtle and elegant, not vibrant or rainbow-like. Left Side (Visual Hero - STRICTLY NO TEXT ON OBJECTS): Multiple high-fidelity 3D glassmorphism objects floating in composition. Futuristic glass materials with inner glow effects, light reflections, floating particles. Premium Apple-style aesthetic. Several schematic glass elements at different depths creating layered composition. Right Side (Typography): Clean, frontal, high-contrast typography. Headline in Heavy Font Black #1D1D1F. Subheadline in Medium weight Dark Gray #4A4A4A. Format: 16:9 horizontal (1920x1080 pixels). Zero cartoonish elements. NO DOMAIN NAMES, NO TEXT ON ANY 3D OBJECTS.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Topic to Publish.
Main 3D Object: A large glassmorphism document/page rising from a luminous vortex of swirling idea particles in blue and purple tones.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass pen floating mid-air emitting light streams; a translucent SEO graph panel showing abstract rising curves.
Third element: A glass publish button with a subtle glow pulse.
Floating glass particles and light orbs connecting the objects.
Headline text: Topic to Publish
Subheadline text: One Topic. Full SEO Article. Done.
Feature list: AI Research & Structure, Internal Linking, AI Illustrations, Voice-Over Ready
Vibe: Transformation, creation, polish.

REQUIREMENTS: Background must be predominantly cream with subtle pastel accent. Strictly follow the visual style from reference images. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT on any 3D objects - all text only on right typography side. Multiple glassmorphism objects creating depth. Professional SaaS marketing quality.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: URL to Publish.
Main 3D Object: A glassmorphism chain-link dissolving into cascading blue-to-purple particles that reassemble into a luminous document silhouette.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass browser window frame; a translucent transformation arrow.
Third element: A glass funnel capturing web fragments and outputting structured content.
Floating glass particles along the transformation path.
Headline text: URL to Publish
Subheadline text: Repurpose Any Content Into Ranked Articles
Feature list: Source URL Ingestion, SEO Rewriting, Brand Voice, Auto-Publish
Vibe: Transformation, repurposing, intelligence.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Turbo Article.
Main 3D Object: A stylized glassmorphism lightning bolt with flowing data streams and glowing particle trails.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass speed rings like a sonic boom; a translucent article page materializing.
Third element: Glass clock with hands spinning rapidly.
Floating glass energy sparks around the bolt.
Headline text: Turbo Article
Subheadline text: SEO Articles in Seconds, Not Hours
Feature list: Ultra-Fast Generation, Budget-Friendly, Full Optimization, Instant Publish
Vibe: Speed, power, efficiency.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Trend Scan.
Main 3D Object: A glassmorphism multi-layer HUD with floating translucent panels showing abstract waveforms and pulse lines.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass radar disc emitting concentric arcs; glass data source icons (globe, signal tower, chat bubble).
Third element: Central radial scanner pulse emanating outward.
Floating glass particles representing captured data points.
Headline text: Trend Scan
Subheadline text: Multi-Source Trends in One Fast Sweep
Feature list: X + Reddit + Web + HackerNews, Real-Time Signals, Ranked Topics, Cross-Platform
Vibe: Surveillance, comprehensive scanning.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Trend Scout X.
Main 3D Object: A sleek glassmorphism satellite dish emitting concentric arc waves in blue and purple tones.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass data nodes floating at various heights, some glowing brighter. Abstract glass bird shape.
Third element: Glass signal towers and notification shapes.
Floating glass particles and signal pulses. Cream background filling entire canvas.
Headline text: Trend Scout X
Subheadline text: Catch Viral X Trends Before Competitors
Feature list: Real-Time Monitoring, Ranked Opportunities, Niche Filtering, Async Processing
Vibe: Discovery, reconnaissance, competitive advantage.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Trend Scout Reddit.
Main 3D Object: An upward-pointing glass arrow composed of stacked layered glowing threads from blue to purple, rising from community-node cluster.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass interconnected orbs forming discussion web; glass upvote arrow with inner glow.
Third element: Translucent community hub sphere with connection lines.
Floating glass particles rising upward with trend signal.
Headline text: Trend Scout Reddit
Subheadline text: Reddit's Hottest Topics, Ready to Publish
Feature list: Community Intelligence, Rising Discussions, Organic Signals, Content Opportunities
Vibe: Community, surfacing trends.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Gap Generator.
Main 3D Object: A glassmorphism puzzle field where most pieces glow cohesively, but one prominent gap highlighted by a bright outlined void radiating golden-purple light.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass analysis grid with scanning lines; translucent competitor panels in background.
Third element: Glass magnifying lens hovering over the gap.
Floating glass measurement particles around the gap area.
Headline text: Gap Generator
Subheadline text: Rank Where Competitors Already Rank
Feature list: Competitor Analysis, Prioritized Topics, Ranking Potential, Content Roadmap
Vibe: Precision, opportunity, competitive intelligence.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Viral Micro-Post.
Main 3D Object: A compact glassmorphism speech bubble radiating concentrated pulse of blue-to-purple light from within.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass ripple rings expanding outward like broadcast pulses; tiny glass social platform icons at ring intersections.
Third element: Glass megaphone silhouette amplifying the signal.
Floating glass particles riding ripple waves outward.
Headline text: Viral Micro-Post
Subheadline text: Scroll-Stopping Social Copy in One Prompt
Feature list: Platform-Native Format, Engagement Hooks, Multi-Brand, Volume Ready
Vibe: Impact, engagement, reach, virality.

Main 3D Object: A sleek glassmorphism horseshoe magnet with blue electric energy coursing along its poles.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass document/PDF shapes drawn toward magnet trailing purple particle streams; translucent email envelope icons.
Third element: Glass download arrow with inner glow.
Curved luminous field lines between documents and magnet.

Subheadline text: Generate Lead Magnets That Actually Convert
Feature list: PDF Checklists, Swipe Files, Strategic Frameworks, Email Gate Ready
Vibe: Attraction, value, conversion.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Content Ingestion.
Main 3D Object: A wide-mouthed glassmorphism funnel in translucent blue glass material.
Secondary 3D Objects: Diverse abstract data streams pouring in - glass chain links (URLs), document shapes, play button (video), audio waveform.
Third element: Single clean structured beam of solid purple light emerging from funnel bottom.
Floating glass particles of raw content being processed and refined.
Headline text: Content Ingestion
Subheadline text: Turn Any URL Into Structured Content
Feature list: YouTube + Web + PDF + Audio, Clean Extraction, Structured Output, Repurpose Ready
Vibe: Processing, refinement, transformation.
